name: io.github.mikimatsub/swsd
description: MCP server for SolarWinds Service Desk: tickets, knowledge base, and the service catalog.

environmentVariables.name: SWSD_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: SolarWinds Service Desk admin token (JWT). Generate in the SWSD UI: Setup -> Users & Groups -> Users -> [your user] -> Actions -> Generate JSON Web Token. Service Desk administrator rights required.

environmentVariables.name: SWSD_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: SWSD API base URL. US tenants: https://api.samanage.com (default). EU tenants: https://apieu.samanage.com.

environmentVariables.name: SWSD_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Tool registration profile: 'triage' (14 read-heavy tools), 'agent' (33 default), 'knowledge' (15 KB-author), 'full' (35 every tool).
